explanation.summary: Carbs are carrying this food most, while minerals are the biggest drag. It lands in S tier.
explanation.whyThisTier: This food lands in S tier with an overall score of 57 from a base nutrition score of 54. Context lifted it by 3 points.

topPros.title: excellent fruit-category fit
topPros.explanation: Very strong fibre moderation and low glycemic behaviour make it a clean example of what the fruit category is supposed to reward.

topCons.title: quite perishable
topCons.explanation: Storage life is not amazing compared with sturdier fruits.

topCons.title: can be pricey
topCons.explanation: Cost can limit how practical it is as a staple fruit.

topCons.title: protein contribution is negligible
topCons.explanation: Not a real flaw for fruit, but still basically absent.

narrationNotes: Context improved the final tier case by 3 points.

closing.summary: Raspberries stands out for excellent fruit-category fit and contains useful polyphenols. but it also gets held back by quite perishable and can be pricey. Best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
closing.useCaseNote: Best when you want sweetness that still earns its place nutritionally.
closing.cta: Would you rank it the same, or nah?
